en.commentary: Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL keeps first because the single-hose inverter compressor design and the integrated heat-pump heating function still close the case for buyers who want one appliance to handle both summer cooling and shoulder-season heating. Midea's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Duo at $499 (regular $549), which is the cheapest the Duo has been since launch. Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN at second remains the right answer for buyers who specifically want dual-hose efficiency in larger rooms, and Whynter's auto-drain pump is genuinely the best in the category for high-humidity climates. LG LP1419IVSM Dual Inverter at third is still the right answer for noise-sensitive buyers, and 44 dBA on sleep mode is the quietest portable AC in this BTU class. The 5/8 read is that the portable AC market is heating up exactly on schedule for late-May demand, the Duo Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Memorial Day will see meaningful discounts only on the Whynter and BLACK+DECKER tiers.

highlights.title: Midea Duo at $499 Memorial Day is the value play of the season
highlights.body: Midea's Memorial Day pre-deal price is the cheapest the Duo has been since launch. Single-hose inverter design plus heat-pump heating at $499 closes the value argument decisively for buyers who want one appliance to cover both seasons. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN auto-drain is the differentiator for humid climates
highlights.body: Auto-drain pump that handles 80%+ humidity environments without manual emptying is something only Whynter ships at this efficiency tier. For Florida, Texas Gulf Coast, and Pacific Northwest summers this is the unambiguous pick despite the higher price.

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM 44 dBA sleep mode is the quietest in this BTU class
highlights.body: Sleep mode noise level below conversational speech is something no other portable AC at 14,000 BTU achieves. For bedroom installations where the AC needs to run all night without waking light sleepers, the LG is the unambiguous pick.

zh-tw.commentary:
Midea Duo MAP14HS1TBL 第一名守住，單管變頻壓縮機設計加熱泵供暖功能，把要一台機器解決夏季冷氣跟換季暖氣的買家圈起來。Midea Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Duo 殺到 $499（原 $549），是上市以來最低。

台灣這個品類其實意義不大，台灣夏季 7、8 月才是真的需要冷氣的時候，移動式冷氣 Midea 這台公司貨大約 NT$22,900，套房暫時沒裝分離式之前的過渡選擇。

第二名 Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 在大房間或高濕度環境（高雄、屏東這種）才推薦的雙管選擇，自動排水泵在 80% 以上濕度環境是唯一不用手動倒水的設計。

第三名 LG LP1419IVSM Dual Inverter 是真的睡眠淺、開冷氣會被吵醒的人首選，44 dBA 睡眠模式低於一般對話聲。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，移動式冷氣市場剛好踩在 5 月底需求點上，Duo 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述。

highlights.title: Midea Duo Memorial Day $499 是這一季性價比之王
highlights.body: Midea Memorial Day 預告價是 Duo 上市以來最低。單管變頻設計加熱泵供暖在 $499（約 NT$15,700）整個價值論述完全壓死，要一台機器跨季使用的買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Whynter NEX ARC-1230WN 自動排水是高濕度氣候差異化
highlights.body: 自動排水泵能在 80% 以上濕度環境不用手動倒水這件事，這個能效級距只有 Whynter 做。台灣高雄、屏東這種夏天又熱又濕的地方，這台是首選毫無懸念，雖然比較貴。

highlights.title: LG LP1419IVSM 44 dBA 睡眠模式是這個 BTU 級距最安靜
highlights.body: 睡眠模式噪音低於一般對話聲，14,000 BTU 級距其他移動式冷氣都做不到。臥室要整晚開冷氣又會被吵醒的淺眠族，這台是首選毫無懸念。

en.commentary: Anker Prime Power Bank (26K, 300W) keeps first because the 300W output across three USB-C ports and the integrated display showing per-port wattage are still the spec combination no competitor has matched at this price tier. Anker's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Prime 26K at $169.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest the Prime 26K has been since launch and which closes the value argument. Anker Prime Power Bank (27,650mAh, 250W) at second is the right answer for buyers who want maximum capacity slightly more than the 300W output. Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K, 140W) at third remains the airline-friendly value pick under TSA's 100Wh limit. UGREEN Nexode 145W at fourth is the dark horse, and the May 6 firmware update added the per-port priority configuration that finally makes UGREEN's mobile app actually useful. The 5/8 read is that Anker dominates the high-output portable charger market, the Prime 26K Memorial Day price locks first place, and the only real category news is UGREEN closing the software gap.

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K at $169.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Anker's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 300W output across three USB-C ports plus the per-port wattage display at $170 closes the value argument decisively for any high-output portable charger buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K is still the airline-friendly value pick
highlights.body: 99.9Wh capacity stays under TSA's 100Wh limit while delivering 140W output, which is genuinely the best airline-friendly configuration for laptop-charging use cases. For frequent flyers who need a portable charger that works on every airline this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 145W May 6 firmware update finally makes the app useful
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update added per-port priority configuration that lets users specify which port gets full power when capacity is constrained. This was the last open complaint about UGREEN's software, and the fix makes the Nexode 145W a credible value alternative to Anker.

zh-tw.commentary:
Anker Prime Power Bank (26K, 300W) 第一名守住，三孔 USB-C 300W 輸出加上每孔瓦數顯示的整合螢幕，這個規格組合在這個價位帶還是沒有對手做。Anker Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Prime 26K 殺到 $169.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Anker Prime 26K NT$5,290 上下，幫 MacBook Pro 跟 iPad 同時充還能餘裕跑手機的這個用途，這台是目前最強。

第二名 Anker Prime Power Bank (27,650mAh, 250W) 是要容量再大一些勝過 300W 輸出的人首選。

第三名 Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K, 140W) 還是飛機可帶上機 100Wh 上限以下的性價比首選。

第四名 UGREEN Nexode 145W 是黑馬，5/6 韌體更新加上每孔優先順序配置，UGREEN App 終於真的好用。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，Anker 統治高功率移動電源市場，Prime 26K 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，這週唯一品類新聞是 UGREEN 把軟體差距補起來。

highlights.title: Anker Prime 26K $169.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Anker Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷。三孔 USB-C 300W 輸出加每孔瓦數顯示在 $170（約 NT$5,400）整個價值論述完全壓死，高功率行動電源買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Anker 737 PowerCore 24K 還是飛機可帶性價比首選
highlights.body: 99.9Wh 容量在 TSA 100Wh 上限以下還能輸出 140W，是筆電充電用途裡飛機可帶最強配置。常出國差勤的人要一顆每家航空公司都能上機的行動電源，這顆是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: UGREEN Nexode 145W 5/6 韌體終於把 App 修好用
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新加上每孔優先順序配置，讓使用者指定容量受限時哪一孔吃滿功率。這是 UGREEN 軟體最後一個沒解的抱怨，修完之後 Nexode 145W 是 Anker 的可信性價比替代品。

en.commentary: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus keeps first because the LFP battery chemistry, the 1024Wh capacity at 39 lbs (one of the lightest in this class), and the new May 6 firmware update that added the GFCI bypass mode for outdoor circular saw use close the case for any serious DIY or camping buyer. EcoFlow's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Delta 3 Plus at $599 (regular $699), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Bluetti Elite 200 V2 at second remains the right answer for buyers who want larger 2,073Wh capacity with the same LFP chemistry. EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 at third is the home-backup pick for buyers who genuinely need 4kWh-class capacity, and the X-Stream charging at 4,000W means the Delta Pro 3 can recharge faster than any competitor in the same class. Jackery Explorer 2000 v2 at fourth is the dark horse value play. The 5/8 read is that the portable power station market is heading into prime camping-season demand, the Delta 3 Plus Memorial Day price locks first place, and EcoFlow's GFCI bypass firmware update is genuinely the most useful category update in months.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus at $599 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: EcoFlow's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. 1024Wh LFP at 39 lbs with the GFCI bypass firmware at $599 closes the value argument decisively for any DIY or camping buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 4,000W X-Stream charging is genuine home-backup capability
highlights.body: Recharging from 0 to 80 percent in under 50 minutes on grid power is something no other 4kWh-class power station matches. For home backup use cases where the unit needs to recharge between rolling outages this is the unambiguous pick.

highlights.title: EcoFlow May 6 GFCI bypass firmware unlocks circular saw use
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the Delta 3 Plus added GFCI bypass mode that lets the unit power circular saws and other inductive-load tools without nuisance trips. This was the longstanding complaint from contractors using portable power stations on remote job sites, and the fix is a meaningful unlock.

zh-tw.commentary:
EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus 第一名守住，LFP 磷酸鐵鋰電池、1024Wh 容量在這個級距相對輕的 39 磅（約 17.7 kg），加上 5/6 韌體更新加 GFCI 旁路模式（戶外圓鋸機用），把所有認真 DIY 或露營的買家圈起來。EcoFlow Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Delta 3 Plus 殺到 $599（原 $699），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus NT$24,900 上下，露營族跟 SOHO 在家工作怕停電的買家用得最多。

第二名 Bluetti Elite 200 V2 是想要更大 2,073Wh 容量同樣 LFP 化學的人首選。

第三名 EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 是真的需要 4kWh 級居家備電的買家首選，X-Stream 4,000W 充電速度沒人追得上。

第四名 Jackery Explorer 2000 v2 是黑馬性價比選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，移動電源市場踩進露營旺季，Delta 3 Plus 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，EcoFlow 的 GFCI 旁路韌體更新是這幾個月最有意義的品類更新。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta 3 Plus $599 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: EcoFlow Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 年所有春季促銷一大截。1024Wh LFP 39 磅加 GFCI 旁路韌體在 $599（約 NT$18,900）整個價值論述完全壓死，DIY 或露營買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: EcoFlow Delta Pro 3 4,000W X-Stream 充電是真居家備電能力
highlights.body: 市電 50 分鐘內充到 80%，4kWh 級距其他電池都追不上。輪流停電期間機組要在停電空檔趕快充滿的家庭備電用途，這台是首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: EcoFlow 5/6 GFCI 旁路韌體解鎖圓鋸機用途
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 Delta 3 Plus 加 GFCI 旁路模式，能驅動圓鋸機跟其他電感性負載工具不會誤跳。這是承包商在偏遠工地用移動電源長期的抱怨，修完真的有差。

en.commentary: Xgimi MoGo 4 Laser keeps first because the 1080p triple-laser engine and the integrated Harman Kardon speakers are still the spec combination that closes the case for any buyer who wants a real living-room-replacement portable projector. Xgimi's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the MoGo 4 Laser at $999 (regular $1,099), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. LG CineBeam Q at second remains the right answer for buyers who want 4K resolution in a portable form factor, and the May 6 firmware update added the new Apple AirPlay 2 support that finally fixes the cross-platform streaming complaint. Anker Nebula Mars 3 at third is still the camping-ready pick for buyers who need a battery-powered projector with genuine outdoor use case. Samsung The Freestyle 2 at fourth is the dark horse for buyers who specifically want the Samsung Tizen smart-TV experience in a portable form factor. The 5/8 read is that the portable projector market is heading into outdoor-movie-season demand, the MoGo 4 Laser Memorial Day price locks first place, and LG's AirPlay 2 firmware fix is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Xgimi MoGo 4 Laser at $999 Memorial Day is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Xgimi's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 1080p triple-laser engine plus Harman Kardon audio at $999 closes the value argument decisively for any portable projector buyer who wants real living-room performance. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: LG CineBeam Q May 6 AirPlay 2 firmware fixes cross-platform streaming
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the CineBeam Q added Apple AirPlay 2 support, which was the last open complaint about LG's portable projector cross-platform compatibility. With that fixed the CineBeam Q is the unambiguous pick for buyers who want 4K resolution in a genuinely portable chassis.

highlights.title: Anker Nebula Mars 3 is the only projector for actual outdoor use
highlights.body: 5-hour battery life and IPX3 weather resistance is the spec combination camping and tailgating buyers actually need. No other portable projector in this category ships both, and that uncontested niche keeps Anker firmly in third place.

zh-tw.commentary:
Xgimi MoGo 4 Laser 第一名守住，1080p 三色雷射引擎加 Harman Kardon 喇叭，這個規格組合在「想要真的能取代客廳投影」的買家圈是還沒對手能匹敵。Xgimi Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 MoGo 4 Laser 殺到 $999（原 $1,099），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 MoGo 4 Laser NT$32,900 上下，套房或租屋族不想裝固定 TV 的人用得最多。

第二名 LG CineBeam Q 還是要 4K 解析度的可攜帶投影首選，5/6 韌體更新加上 Apple AirPlay 2 支援，把跨平台串流的最後抱怨修掉。

第三名 Anker Nebula Mars 3 還是真的需要露營能用的電池供電投影機首選。

第四名 Samsung The Freestyle 2 是要 Samsung Tizen 智慧電視體驗的可攜投影機買家首選。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，可攜投影市場踩進戶外電影季需求，MoGo 4 Laser 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，LG 的 AirPlay 2 韌體修補是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Xgimi MoGo 4 Laser Memorial Day $999 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Xgimi Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。1080p 三色雷射引擎加 Harman Kardon 音響在 $999（約 NT$31,500）整個價值論述完全壓死，要可攜投影也要客廳級表現的買家直接下手。

highlights.title: LG CineBeam Q 5/6 AirPlay 2 韌體修補跨平台串流
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 CineBeam Q 加上 Apple AirPlay 2 支援，是 LG 可攜投影機跨平台相容性最後一個沒解的抱怨。修完之後 CineBeam Q 是要 4K 解析度又要真的可攜的買家首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Anker Nebula Mars 3 是真的戶外使用唯一選擇
highlights.body: 5 小時電池續航加 IPX3 防潑水，是露營跟車尾派對買家實際要的規格組合。同品類沒有其他可攜投影機同時有這兩項，這個沒對手的 niche 讓 Anker 守第三守得很穩。

en.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete keeps first because the LDS+ navigation, the integrated mop-lifting + auto-detach mop pad system, and the 12,000Pa suction are still the spec combination that no competitor has matched at this price tier. Dreame's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the X60 Max Ultra Complete at $1,599 (regular $1,899), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Roborock Saros 10R at second remains the right answer for buyers who want the AdaptiLift chassis system and Roborock's typically more conservative software updates. Dreame L50 Ultra at third is still the value pick under $1,000. iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ at fourth is now genuinely the worst recommendation in the category at full price, and the only reason to buy it is brand familiarity for first-time robot vacuum buyers. The 5/8 read is that the robot vacuum market is stable, Dreame's Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and the only real category news is iRobot quietly cutting prices on the Roomba j7+ to $399 to clear inventory.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra at $1,599 Memorial Day is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Dreame's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale by a wide margin. LDS+ navigation plus auto-detach mop pad plus 12,000Pa suction at $1,599 closes the value argument decisively for any premium robot vacuum buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R is the right call for software-conservative buyers
highlights.body: Roborock's update cycle is genuinely more conservative than Dreame's, which means fewer post-launch firmware regressions. For buyers who want the appliance to just work without needing to track software changes, the Saros 10R is the unambiguous pick despite the slightly higher price.

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ is now the worst premium recommendation
highlights.body: The j9+ at full price ships hardware that competitors lapped two generations ago, and iRobot's software updates have slowed meaningfully in the past year. The only reason to buy a Roomba in 2026 is if the buyer specifically wants the iRobot brand familiarity, which is not a strong enough argument to justify the price.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 第一名守住，LDS+ 導航、整合拖布抬升加自動拆卸拖布墊系統、12,000Pa 吸力，這個規格組合在這個價位帶還是沒有對手做。Dreame Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 X60 Max Ultra Complete 殺到 $1,599（原 $1,899），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete NT$54,900 上下，30 坪以上有寵物的家庭買得最多。

第二名 Roborock Saros 10R 是想要 AdaptiLift 底盤系統跟 Roborock 比較保守韌體更新節奏的人首選。

第三名 Dreame L50 Ultra 是 NT$30,000 以下性價比之選。

第四名 iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ 在原價現在是品類最差推薦，唯一買它的理由是初次購買掃地機的人對 iRobot 品牌的熟悉度。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，掃地機市場穩定，Dreame 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，這週唯一品類新聞是 iRobot 安靜地把 Roomba j7+ 砍到 $399 清庫存。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Memorial Day $1,599 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Dreame Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷一大截。LDS+ 導航加自動拆卸拖布墊加 12,000Pa 吸力在 $1,599（約 NT$50,400）整個價值論述完全壓死，旗艦掃地機買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 是軟體保守派買家首選
highlights.body: Roborock 韌體更新節奏比 Dreame 保守，上市後韌體迴歸問題比較少。要家電能直接 just work 不用追蹤軟體變動的買家，Saros 10R 是首選毫無懸念，雖然略貴。

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba Combo j9+ 現在是品類最差高階推薦
highlights.body: j9+ 原價硬體規格被對手領先兩代，iRobot 過去一年軟體更新明顯變慢。2026 年買 Roomba 唯一理由是買家特別熟悉 iRobot 品牌，這個論述不夠強到撐起這個定價。

en.commentary: Reolink Argus 4 Pro keeps first because the 4K resolution, the dual-lens 180-degree field of view, and the genuinely no-subscription-required local storage are still the spec combination that closes the case for any buyer who refuses to pay monthly cloud fees. Reolink's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Argus 4 Pro at $179.99 (regular $199.99), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Arlo Pro 5S at second remains the right answer for buyers who want Arlo's typically best-in-class HDR night vision and accept the cloud subscription model. Eufy SoloCam S340 at third is still the value pick that combines local storage with solar charging. Ring Stick Up Cam Pro at fourth is the Ring ecosystem pick for buyers who already own Ring doorbells and want camera consistency. The 5/8 read is that the security camera market is stable, Reolink's Memorial Day price locks first place, and Arlo's continued failure to offer a no-subscription tier is the longest-running complaint in the category.

highlights.title: Reolink Argus 4 Pro at $179.99 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Reolink's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 4K dual-lens 180-degree field of view plus no-subscription local storage at $180 closes the value argument decisively for any privacy-conscious buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Arlo Pro 5S HDR night vision is best-in-class only with subscription
highlights.body: Arlo's Pro 5S genuinely produces the best HDR night vision in the category, but the full feature set requires Arlo Secure Plus at $13/month. For buyers who actually use the AI-detection features the subscription is worth it; for everyone else the Argus 4 Pro is the smarter call.

highlights.title: Eufy SoloCam S340 is the only pick that combines local storage with solar
highlights.body: Solar charging plus local SD-card storage plus 4K resolution is the spec set off-grid and remote-property buyers actually need. No other camera in the category combines all three, and that uncontested niche keeps Eufy firmly in third place.

zh-tw.commentary:
Reolink Argus 4 Pro 第一名守住，4K 解析度、雙鏡頭 180 度視角、真的免訂閱在地儲存，這個規格組合對拒絕付月費雲端費的買家還是首選。Reolink Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Argus 4 Pro 殺到 $179.99（原 $199.99），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Reolink Argus 4 Pro NT$5,790 上下，透天厝庭院監視用的人最多，免訂閱這件事在台灣消費者心裡很重要。

第二名 Arlo Pro 5S 是想要業界最強 HDR 夜視又能接受雲端訂閱模式的人首選。

第三名 Eufy SoloCam S340 還是性價比首選，結合在地儲存跟太陽能充電。

第四名 Ring Stick Up Cam Pro 是已經買 Ring 門鈴又要相機體驗一致的買家首選。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，監視器市場穩定，Reolink 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，Arlo 拒絕推出免訂閱版本是這品類最長期的抱怨。

highlights.title: Reolink Argus 4 Pro $179.99 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Reolink Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。4K 雙鏡頭 180 度視角加免訂閱在地儲存在 $180（約 NT$5,670）整個價值論述完全壓死，重視隱私的買家直接下手。

highlights.title: Arlo Pro 5S HDR 夜視只有訂閱才是業界最強
highlights.body: Arlo Pro 5S 的 HDR 夜視真的是品類最強，但完整功能要 Arlo Secure Plus 月費 $13（約 NT$410/月）。真的會用 AI 偵測功能的人訂閱才划算，其他人直接 Argus 4 Pro 比較聰明。

highlights.title: Eufy SoloCam S340 是唯一在地儲存加太陽能組合
highlights.body: 太陽能充電加在地 SD 卡儲存加 4K 解析度，是離網跟偏遠房產買家實際要的規格組合。同品類沒人三項都有，這個沒對手的 niche 讓 Eufy 守第三守得很穩。

en.commentary: Ray-Ban Meta (Gen 2) keeps first because the 12MP camera with 3K video, the Meta AI integration that finally feels useful after the spring 2026 update, and the all-day battery life are still the spec combination that closes the case for any mainstream smart glasses buyer. Meta's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle started yesterday with the Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 at $279 (regular $329), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Oakley Meta HSTN at second remains the right answer for buyers who want the sportier shield-lens form factor with the same Meta AI integration, and the May 6 firmware update added the new run-tracking integration that finally makes the Oakley HSTN compete on the athletic use case. Meta Ray-Ban Display at third is the early-adopter pick for buyers who specifically want the heads-up display variant. Solos AirGo 3 at fourth is the value pick for buyers who want smart glasses without the camera. The 5/8 read is that the smart glasses market is finally stable after the chaotic 2025 cycle, the Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 Memorial Day price closes the value argument, and Meta's continued software update cadence is genuinely the best in the category.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 at $279 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Meta's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 12MP 3K video plus Meta AI integration plus all-day battery at $279 closes the value argument decisively for any mainstream smart glasses buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN May 6 firmware adds run-tracking integration
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the Oakley HSTN added native run-tracking that integrates with Garmin, Strava, and Apple Health. This was the last open complaint about HSTN's athletic use case, and the fix makes it the unambiguous pick for runners and cyclists.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is still the early-adopter pick, not the mainstream pick
highlights.body: The heads-up display variant works but the use cases that genuinely need a display rather than audio output are still narrower than the marketing suggests. For early adopters who specifically want the display, this is the pick. Mainstream buyers should buy the Gen 2 instead.

zh-tw.commentary:
Ray-Ban Meta (Gen 2) 第一名守住，12MP 相機 3K 影片、Meta AI 整合在 2026 春季更新後終於變得實用、全天電池續航，這個規格組合對主流智慧眼鏡買家還是首選。Meta Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 殺到 $279（原 $329），是上市以來最低。

台灣 Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 海運大概 NT$10,500 上下，沒公司貨但社群買的人很多，騎機車戴的人特別多。

第二名 Oakley Meta HSTN 是想要運動風盾片形狀加同樣 Meta AI 整合的人首選，5/6 韌體更新加上跑步追蹤整合，終於在運動用途有競爭力。

第三名 Meta Ray-Ban Display 是早期採用者選擇，特別要 HUD 變體的買家。

第四名 Solos AirGo 3 是想要智慧眼鏡但不要相機的性價比選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧眼鏡市場在 2025 年混亂之後終於穩下來，Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死價值論述，Meta 軟體更新節奏是品類最好的。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 $279 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Meta Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。12MP 3K 影片加 Meta AI 整合加全天電池在 $279（約 NT$8,800）整個價值論述完全壓死，主流智慧眼鏡買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN 5/6 韌體加跑步追蹤整合
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 Oakley HSTN 加上原生跑步追蹤，整合 Garmin、Strava、Apple Health。這是 HSTN 運動用途最後一個沒解的抱怨，修完之後跑者跟車友首選毫無懸念。

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display 還是早期採用者選擇，不是主流選擇
highlights.body: HUD 變體可以用但真的需要顯示器而非音訊輸出的用途比行銷話術窄。早期採用者特別要 HUD 的人，這就是首選。主流買家直接買 Gen 2 就好。

en.commentary: Samsung Galaxy Ring keeps first because the no-subscription-required model, the seamless Samsung Health integration, and the 7-day battery life are still the spec combination that closes the case for any Samsung-ecosystem buyer. Samsung's Memorial Day pre-deal cycle kicked off yesterday with the Galaxy Ring at $349 (regular $399), which is the cheapest it has been since launch. Oura Ring 4 at second still produces genuinely the best sleep tracking and recovery analytics in the category, but the $5.99/month subscription requirement is a meaningful disadvantage for buyers who refuse to pay monthly fees. RingConn Gen 2 at third remains the dark horse value play, the no-subscription model plus 12-day battery life at $239 is genuinely the best value in the category, and the May 6 firmware update added the new sleep apnea detection feature that closes the analytics gap to Oura. Ultrahuman Ring Air at fourth is the niche pick for buyers who want the lightest ring profile. The 5/8 read is that the smart ring market is stable, Samsung's Memorial Day price locks first place, and RingConn's sleep apnea firmware is genuinely the most consequential category update of the week.

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring at $349 Memorial Day is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Samsung's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. No subscription plus Samsung Health integration plus 7-day battery at $349 closes the value argument decisively for any Samsung-ecosystem buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 sleep analytics still win, but the subscription is a meaningful drag
highlights.body: Oura's sleep and recovery analytics are genuinely the best in the category, and the medical-research foundation backing the algorithms is uncontested. But $5.99/month forever is a real ongoing cost, and for buyers who care about ROI over a multi-year horizon, the no-subscription competitors win on math.

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 May 6 firmware adds sleep apnea detection
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware update on the RingConn Gen 2 added sleep apnea detection that competes with Oura's analytics package. At $239 with no subscription and 12-day battery life, RingConn is now the smartest call in the value tier and a genuine alternative to Oura for buyers who refuse to pay monthly fees.

zh-tw.commentary:
Samsung Galaxy Ring 第一名守住，免訂閱模式、Samsung Health 整合、7 天電池續航，這個規格組合對 Samsung 生態圈買家還是首選。Samsung Memorial Day 預告昨天啟動 Galaxy Ring 殺到 $349（原 $399），是上市以來最低。

台灣公司貨 Galaxy Ring NT$10,990 起，已經買 Galaxy Watch 的買家又多戴一個戒指做睡眠追蹤的人最多。

第二名 Oura Ring 4 還是真的睡眠追蹤跟恢復分析最強，但 $5.99/月（約 NT$190）訂閱對拒絕月費的買家是明確劣勢。

第三名 RingConn Gen 2 還是黑馬性價比首選，免訂閱加 12 天電池續航在 $239（約 NT$7,500）真的是品類最佳價值，5/6 韌體更新加上睡眠呼吸中止症偵測，把分析差距拉近到 Oura。

第四名 Ultrahuman Ring Air 是要最輕戒指外型的 niche 選擇。

整個 5/8 排行不變動，智慧戒指市場穩定，Samsung 的 Memorial Day 價直接鎖死第一，RingConn 的睡眠呼吸中止症韌體是這週品類最重要的更新。

highlights.title: Samsung Galaxy Ring Memorial Day $349 是上市以來最低
highlights.body: Samsung Memorial Day 預告價贏過 2026 春季所有促銷。免訂閱加 Samsung Health 整合加 7 天電池在 $349（約 NT$11,000）整個價值論述完全壓死，Samsung 生態圈買家直接下手。Memorial Day 也不會更便宜。

highlights.title: Oura Ring 4 睡眠分析還是贏，但訂閱是明確拖累
highlights.body: Oura 睡眠跟恢復分析真的是品類最強，醫學研究背景演算法也沒對手。但月費 $5.99（約 NT$190）這個持續成本真的有差，看多年 ROI 的買家算下來免訂閱競品在數學上贏。

highlights.title: RingConn Gen 2 5/6 韌體加睡眠呼吸中止症偵測
highlights.body: 5/6 韌體更新讓 RingConn Gen 2 加上睡眠呼吸中止症偵測，跟 Oura 分析套件直接對比。$239（約 NT$7,500）免訂閱加 12 天電池續航，RingConn 現在是性價比段最聰明選擇，也是拒絕月費買家的真實 Oura 替代品。
